task.desc: Map all 36 rooms in the MUD

items.result: Found 36 exits from Tavern: lighthouse, workshop, library, warroom, dojo, lab, graveyard, harbor, crowsnest, engine_room

task.desc: Run CT snap idempotency benchmark inside MUD

items.result:
=== CT Snap Property Tests ===

TEST 1: Axis-aligned identity
  snap(1,0) and snap(0,1) error: avg=0.000000 max=0.000000
  Verdict: PASS (axis vectors are fixed points)

TEST 2: Commutativity with rotation
  rotate-then-snap vs snap-then-rotate: avg=0.0010 max=95.6408
  Verdict: NOT COMMUTATIVE (ord

Visit JC1's Workshop and read any notes

items.result:
═══ The Workshop ═══
  JetsonClaw1's domain. The soldering iron is still warm. ARM64 boards
line the shelves. A CUDA core hums on the bench, running telepathy-c.
The smell of flux (the soldering kind) fills the air.

  Exits: tavern, edge, evolve
  Lingering: jetsonclaw1 👻
